articles.title: When Elon Musk said “The Future Should Look Like the Future,” Bolivia Took It Seriously
articles.description: Bolivia is a landlocked country – one of the few in the world – nestled in the Andes, where rugged terrain makes delivering healthcare to remote communities a massive challenge. Enter my favorite truck: the Cybertruck! I’m not alone in my obsession. Friends of mine drive theirs daily, and thanks to Tesla’s generous demo-drive program […]

articles.title: Elon Musk Says Waymo ‘Never Had a Chance’ Against Tesla
articles.description:
Elon Musk reignited the long-running Tesla vs. Waymo autonomy debate this week, saying that Waymo “never really had a chance” against Tesla’s approach to self-driving. The comment came directly in response to Google DeepMind Chief Scientist Jeff Dean, who highlighted Waymo’s data-driven safety record and its growing lead in fully driverless miles. Dean pointed to […]
